title: Clinical Data Analytics Platform
summary: Comprehensive data analysis platform supporting clinical and operational decision-making at Myriad Genetics.
problem: Clinical and operational teams needed centralized access to patient data insights and performance metrics to support decision-making processes.
solution_overview: Built comprehensive analytics platform with automated data pipelines, interactive dashboards, and real-time reporting capabilities for healthcare operations.

architecture.alt: Clinical analytics platform architecture showing data flow and dashboard integration

my_contributions: Developed SQL queries for data extraction and validation from clinical databases
Created interactive dashboards using Power BI and Tableau for key performance metrics
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver actionable insights
Implemented data validation processes to ensure accuracy and compliance
challenges: Ensuring HIPAA compliance and data privacy
Creating user-friendly dashboards for non-technical stakeholders

code_snippets.caption: Clinical data validation query
code_snippets.code:
WITH patient_metrics AS (
  SELECT 
    patient_id,
    test_date,
    test_result,
    CASE 
      WHEN test_result IS NULL THEN 'Missing'
      WHEN test_result < 0 THEN 'Invalid'
      ELSE 'Valid'
    END as data_quality
  FROM clinical_tests
  WHERE test_date >= DATEADD(month, -3, GETDATE())
)
SELECT 
  data_quality,
  COUNT(*) as record_count,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER(), 2) as percentage
FROM patient_metrics
GROUP BY data_quality;

results: Processed 1M+ clinical records daily with 99% accuracy
Reduced report generation time by 75% through automation
Enabled data-driven decisions for 50+ healthcare professionals
Improved operational efficiency through real-time dashboards
lessons: Healthcare data requires strict validation and compliance measures
User-friendly visualizations are crucial for clinical adoption

cover_image.alt: Clinical Data Analytics Platform dashboard showing healthcare metrics

title: Enterprise Data Pipeline Platform

solution_overview: Built unified data pipeline with automated ingestion, transformation, and loading processes using modern data engineering tools and cloud infrastructure.

title: Real-time Analytics Platform
summary: Built streaming analytics platform for Qualcomm Technologies Inc processing high-volume data with real-time insights and monitoring.
problem: Business teams needed real-time insights from high-volume data streams to make immediate operational and strategic decisions.
solution_overview: Implemented streaming analytics architecture with Kafka for ingestion, Spark for processing, and BigQuery for analytical queries with comprehensive monitoring.

architecture.alt: Real-time analytics platform architecture showing streaming data flow

my_contributions: Designed streaming data architecture for high-throughput processing
Built real-time data processing pipelines using Spark Streaming
Implemented comprehensive monitoring and alerting systems
Optimized system performance for cost-effective operations
challenges: Handling high-volume data streams with minimal latency
Ensuring system reliability and fault tolerance

code_snippets.caption: Real-time stream processing with Spark
code_snippets.code:
from pyspark.sql import SparkSession
from pyspark.sql.functions import *
from pyspark.sql.types import *

def process_realtime_stream(spark):
    # Read from Kafka stream
    df = spark \
        .readStream \
        .format("kafka") \
        .option("kafka.bootstrap.servers", "localhost:9092") \
        .option("subscribe", "events") \
        .load()
    
    # Parse and transform data
    parsed_df = df.select(
        col("timestamp").cast("timestamp"),
        from_json(col("value").cast("string"), event_schema).alias("data")
    ).select(
        col("timestamp"),
        col("data.event_type"),
        col("data.user_id"),
        col("data.metrics")
    )
    
    # Aggregate in real-time
    aggregated = parsed_df \
        .groupBy(
            window(col("timestamp"), "1 minute"),
            col("event_type")
        ) \
        .agg(
            count("*").alias("event_count"),
            avg("metrics.value").alias("avg_value")
        )
    
    return aggregated

results: Processing 500K+ events per second with 99.9% reliability
Achieved sub-second query response times for real-time analytics
Reduced infrastructure costs by 40% through optimization
Enabled real-time business intelligence and decision making
lessons: Real-time systems require careful architecture planning for scalability
Monitoring and alerting are critical for production streaming systems
Performance optimization can significantly reduce operational costs
